intro: Mondo grass, scientifically known as Mondo planiscapum, is a type of perennial grass native to Southeast Asia, traditionally used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Mondo grass include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory properties, which have been reported to aid in the treatment of various conditions, such as arthritis, fever, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Mondo grass include saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Mondo grass is often prepared in the form of decoctions, infusions, or powdered extracts, which are commonly used to treat fever, cough, and other respiratory conditions.
